revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月十八]][[zh:八月十八]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 18|qq=August 18}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|en|Tenpyō-hōji|qid=Q1346307|lt=Tenpyō-hōji|1=Tenpyō-hōji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|757|en|757|qid=Q409717|lt=757|1=757}} {{ill|September 6|en|September 6|qid=Q2858|lt=September 6|1=September 6}} ) – Due to a silkworm forming the inscription "May 8th, open below: the order of Emperor Shakuhōchi for a hundred years of longevity", the era name was changed to Tenpyō Hōji. * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|qid=Q1146135|lt=Keian|1=Keian}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1651|en|1651|qid=Q6956|lt=1651|1=1651}} {{ill|October 2|en|October 2|qid=Q2932|lt=October 2|1=October 2}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|en|Tokugawa Ietsuna|qid=Q323422|lt=Tokugawa Ietsuna|1=Tokugawa Ietsuna}} assumed office as the 4th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shogun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * {{ill|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1146161}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1769|en|1769|qid=Q7679|lt=1769|1=1769}} {{ill|September 17|en|September 17|qid=Q2894|lt=September 17|1=September 17}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieharu|en|Tokugawa Ieharu|qid=Q437518|lt=Tokugawa Ieharu|1=Tokugawa Ieharu}} 's close attendant, {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|en|Tanuma Okitsugu|qid=Q521070|lt=Tanuma Okitsugu|1=Tanuma Okitsugu}} , was appointed to the Rank of {{ill|Rōjū|en|Rōjū|qid=Q1196812|lt=Rōjū|1=Rōjū}} . * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} {{ill|September 30|en|September 30|qid=Q2881|lt=September 30|1=September 30}} ) – The {{ill|August 18 Incident|ja|八月十八日の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August 18 Incident|1=8/18 incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1041337}} . == Births == * {{ill|Jingo-keiun|en|Jingo-keiun|qid=Q1373049|lt=Jingokeiun|1=Jingo-keiun}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|767|en|767|qid=Q409960|lt=767|1=767}} {{ill|September 15|en|September 15|qid=Q2846|lt=September 15|1=September 15}} ) – {{ill|Saichō|en|Saichō|qid=Q449943|lt=Saichō|1=Saichō}} (Dengyō Daishi), founder of Japan's {{ill|Tiantai|en|Tiantai|qid=Q668188|lt=Tendai Buddhism|1=Tiantai}} , (d. {{ill|822|en|822|qid=Q29928|lt=822|1=822}} ). * {{ill|Bunki|en|Bunki|qid=Q1324885|lt=Bunkame|1=Bunki}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1503|en|1503|qid=Q6141|lt=1503|1=1503}} {{ill|September 8|en|September 8|qid=Q2850|lt=September 8|1=September 8}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Katsuhisa|en|Shimazu Katsuhisa|qid=Q3194228|lt=Shimazu Katsuhisa|1=Shimazu Katsuhisa}} , the 14th head of the {{ill|Shimazu clan|ja|Shimazu Clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , (d. {{ill|1573|en|1573|qid=Q6678|lt=1573|1=1573}} ). * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1567|en|1567|qid=Q6642|lt=1567|1=1567}} {{ill|September 20|en|September 20|qid=Q2892|lt=September 20|1=September 20}} ) – {{ill|Tachibana Muneshige|en|Tachibana Muneshige|qid=Q1071770|lt=Tachibana Muneshige|1=Tachibana Muneshige}} , the first lord of the {{ill|Yanagawa Domain|en|Yanagawa Domain|qid=Q3034574|lt=Yanagawa Domain|1=Yanagawa Domain}} , (d. {{ill|1643|en|1643|qid=Q6917|lt=1643|1=1643}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1828|en|1828|qid=Q7570|lt=1828|1=1828}} {{ill|September 26|en|September 26|qid=Q2885|lt=September 26|1=September 26}} ) – {{ill|Kobayashi Torasaburō|en|Kobayashi Torasaburō|qid=Q3532209|lt=Kobayashi Torazō|1=Kobayashi Torasaburō}} , the {{ill|Chief Councillor|ja|大参事|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chief Councillor|1=daisanji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11433206}} of the {{ill|Nagaoka Domain|en|Nagaoka Domain|qid=Q1041310|lt=Echigo Nagaoka Domain|1=Nagaoka Domain}} , (d. {{ill|1877|en|1877|qid=Q7773|lt=1877|1=1877}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|qid=Q2923|lt=October 9|1=October 9}} ) – {{ill|Sakurai Jōji|ja|桜井錠二|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakurai Jōji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 櫻井錠二|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 櫻井錠二|1=Sakurai Jōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11544807}} , a {{ill|Chemist|en|Chemist|qid=Q593644|lt=chemist|1=Chemist}} , (d. {{ill|1939|en|1939|qid=Q18639|lt=1939|1=1939}} ). * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} {{ill|September 18|en|September 18|qid=Q2893|lt=September 18|1=September 18}} ) – {{ill|Itō Sachio|en|Itō Sachio|qid=Q176579|lt=Itō Sazenchū|1=Itō Sachio}} , a {{ill|poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|1=Waka poet|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11122954}} and {{ill|novelist|ja|Novelist|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/novelist|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , (d. {{ill|1913|en|1913|qid=Q2080|lt=1913|1=1913}} ). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|qid=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} {{ill|September 13|en|September 13|qid=Q2848|lt=September 13|1=September 13}} ) – {{ill|Saitō Takao (politician)|en|Saitō Takao (politician)|qid=Q1698248|lt=Saitō Takao|1=Saitō Takao (politician)}} , a {{ill|Lawyer|en|Lawyer|qid=Q40348|lt=lawyer|1=Lawyer}} and {{ill|Politician|en|Politician|qid=Q82955|lt=politician|1=Politician}} , (d. {{ill|1949|en|1949|qid=Q5188|lt=1949|1=1949}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1598|en|1598|qid=Q6800|lt=1598|1=1598}} {{ill|September 18|en|September 18|qid=Q2893|lt=September 18|1=September 18}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} , a {{ill|military commander|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} and {{ill|Kampaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kampaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1199966}} , (b. {{ill|1537|en|1537|qid=Q6461|lt=1537|1=1537}} ).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|17|8|19|7|18|9|8|0818|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
